name: athletixos-rls-harness
description: Two-club RLS isolation proof. Spins up a throwaway local Postgres, applies the repo's real migrations (including 20260702000000_enable_rls), creates the RLS-enforced athletix_app role, and runs a cross-tenant read/insert/update/delete matrix through the real lib/tenantPrisma wrapper.
comment: The harness pins its own Prisma 6 (engineType=client → pure WASM, no native engine download) independent of the app's Prisma 5.7. The wrapper under test (../../lib/tenantPrisma.ts) uses only the stable $extends/$transaction/$executeRaw surface, identical across both versions.
